case_title: ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES VS. LI-CHUN LO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LO, LI-CHUN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LO, LI-CHUN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ONE SAINT FRANCIS PLACE, APARTMENT #3505, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ARCHSTONE COMMUNITIES AS TO DEFENDANT LO, LI-CHUN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LO, LI-CHUN
